title: Ingredient nutrition conversion model
summary: Approved public nutrition bundles를 canonical ingredient 영양 profile과 승인 기반 volume/piece conversion에 연결하되 source evidence, representative profile, ingredient assignment를 분리한다.
goal: FoodSafety pilot 30 recipe 재료가 출처·version·freshness·검수 이력을 가진 영양값과 실용 대표 환산값만 사용하도록 fail-closed data model과 internal import contract를 잠근다.

owners.claude: replaced for this nutrition slice by explicit user approval; the global stage-owner SOP is unchanged
owners.codex: role-separated Codex sessions own Stage 1 authoring, Stage 1.5 independent docs review/repair-final, Stage 2 implementation, and exact-head Stage 3 review; authoring and implementation work cannot self-approve

out_of_scope: Public API endpoint, response field, route, frontend component, or user-facing UI
Recipe nutrition calculation, immutable recipe snapshots, and RECIPE_DETAIL nutrition display
Prepared food catalog, product planner entries, and planner nutrition aggregation
Runtime provider fetch, cron refresh, API key access, and source acquisition pagination
Chemical density, cooking loss, absorption, generic piece weight, or name-only automatic approval
RDA measurement source table, text, layout, image, or full dataset republication
Production load before separate operator approval
notes: Stage 1 docs and independent Stage 1.5 review merged through PR #999 at f8cb3ed10bd92f3832914512239c68325b3f06ad. Stage 2 merged through PR #1004 at 574c078e98a080d0f4812bc593f4a6aa524efcf2 from exact implementation head 829f4e15e0a1fd038cc6323a4efb3ca71fff7800. The actual public-data FoodSafety-30 pilot and retained evidence merged through PR #1005 at 3866952c3e81bedfd80593f576e5ed6183ec7538. Canonical lifecycle is merged, approval is codex_approved under the user-approved Codex-only nutrition exception, and verification is passed. A closeout repair reran all 65 migrations in two fresh isolated PostgreSQL 14.5 databases and verified 10 nutrition tables, 5 active profiles, RLS on all 10 tables, 2 critical partial unique indexes, plus an authenticated admin viewer write denial. Supabase Docker/PostgreSQL 17 equivalence remains unverified and explicit. Human nutrition/conversion/piece review and production load remain Manual Only follow-ups; production/staging writes are 0, public API/UI are unchanged, and Design/Accessibility/Playwright are N/A.
